ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melvin Thompson, via Zoom, for Ronald McCoy, Petitioner.

The court notes the status petition filed with the court and queries counsel as to the status of the inventory and appraisal ("I&A"). Counsel reports that not all assets have been marshalled and hopes to have an update to the court by the hearing set for Sep-19-2022. Counsel advises that he had technical issues at the last calling of the matter which caused him to miss the hearing.

After additional discussion, the matters are taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To May-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Ronald W. McCoy and Attorney Melvin Thompson to appear on May-09-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
